## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ Resolved blockers (iter-303 addition)

- **DUAL `sliceDualTransportInv.app` CLOSED axiom-clean** (the ~100-LOC instance-delicate
  reverse component that drove the iter-265‚Üí302 churning; DualInverse.lean 6‚Üí5 sorries). It is
  the explicit 4-leg composite: source relabel `M.val.map (eqToHom (op he.symm))` (semilinear)
  ‚ąė Ōą-reindex `restrictScalars (f.appIso).hom ‚ąė Ōą.app` ‚ąė `dualUnitRingSwapHom` ‚ąė cross-fiber
  transport. The cross-fiber `?collapse` = `restrictScalarsId'App ‚ąė restrictScalarsComp'App`;
  `?unit` = new helper `unitRelabelSwap`. Naturality + round-trips are now reachable.
- **ENGINE kernel-`whnf` wall REMOVED** (the iters 264/265/271 blocker). The fix is to spell the
  push‚Äďpull map with the over-triangle `w : a ‚Čę p‚āĀ = p‚āā` as a FREE hypothesis (`rawPushPullMap`),
  then `subst` it: every `eqToHom` over-triangle transport becomes `eqToHom rfl = ūĚüô` and vanishes
  kernel-cheaply. `pushPullMap_eq_raw` bridges `pushPullMap = rawPushPullMap` by `rfl`.

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ Proof patterns (iter-303 addition)

- **Free-hypothesis-then-`subst` to kill `eqToHom` transports.** When a definition bakes an
  `eqToHom` transport along a propositional equality `w` (here an `Over X` over-triangle), the
  kernel `whnf`-explodes on it. Re-spell the definition with `w` as a free hypothesis argument
  (a "raw" form), prove a `rfl` bridge from the packaged form, then `subst w` in the lemma:
  the transport collapses to `ūĚüô` syntactically. This is what finally cleared the 5-iter
  push‚Äďpull kernel wall.
- **`pushforward` of sheaves of modules is STRICT**: `(pushforwardComp a p).hom.app M = ūĚüô _` by
  `rfl` (`pushforward (a‚Čęp) = pushforward a ‚čô pushforward p` definitionally) ‚ÄĒ
  `pushforwardComp_hom_app_id`. Use to collapse all `pushforwardComp` legs of a pentagon.
- **ő≤-compatibility hypothesis pattern for abstract dual transports.** The reverse dual map is
  unprovable for an *abstract* base-change ring map `ő≤`; carry `hő≤ : ‚ąÄ P, (ő≤.app (op P)).hom.comp
  (f.appIso P).hom = RingHom.id` as a binder and discharge it at the call site for the concrete
  `ő≤ = whiskerRight (f.appIso).inv` via `Iso.hom_inv_id`.
- **őĶ-iso for an `eqToHom`-induced section-ring relabel** must be phrased at the `X.presheaf`
  (CommRingCat) carrier so `CommRing` is native: `isIso_őĶ_restrictScalars_presheafMap` via
  `restrictScalars_isIso_őĶ_of_bijective (‚Ä¶).hom (ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso ‚Ä¶)`.

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-002 addition)

NOTE: everything above this heading is parent-Jacobian carryover (iters ‚Č§ 303). The
RiemannRoch subproject's own iteration counter restarts at iter-001.

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **`finrank`-level transport beats `FiniteDimensional`-instance transport when synthesis
  times out.** Transporting `FiniteDimensional`/`Module.Finite` across a project `LinearEquiv`
  (e.g. `HModule_linearEquiv_of_iso`) via `Module.Finite.equiv`/`.finiteDimensional` can FAIL at
  typeclass *synthesis* ‚ÄĒ the equiv's own `HasSheafify`/`HasExt` binders don't key-match the
  ambient instance, giving a deterministic 20000-heartbeat timeout ‚ÄĒ even though the types are
  defeq. Fix: transport at the `finrank` level (`LinearEquiv.finrank_eq` then
  `FiniteDimensional.of_finrank_eq_succ`); `exact`/`rw` match up to defeq where synthesis cannot.
- **Base-case factoring removes inherited `sorryAx`.** A headline routed through a strong-induction
  carrier inherits any `sorryAx` from the carrier's `succ` branch even when it only needs the base
  case. Factor the base case into a standalone lemma ‚Üí the headline becomes axiom-clean. Did exactly
  this: `H1_skyscraperSheaf_finrank_eq_zero` now routes through `HModule_flasque_one_eq_zero` (the
  `i=1` branch, `injective_flasque`-free, only uses Mathlib `Injective.injective_under`) instead of
  `HModule_flasque_eq_zero` (whose `succ` case pulls in the `sorryAx`-carrying `injective_flasque`).
- **Compactness ‚áí finite affine cover for finiteness of codim-1 support.** With `[CompactSpace X]`,
  `isCompact_iff_finite_and_eq_biUnion_affineOpens` on `‚ä§` gives a finite affine cover; reduce a
  global finiteness to a finite union of per-chart finiteness (`Set.Finite.biUnion`).
- **Mathlib renames hit this iter**: `Set.eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem` ‚Üí `...notMem`.

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-005 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **Noetherian-local regularity = one inequality** (SmoothRegular Decl 1 reduction): to prove
  `IsRegularLocalRing R`, apply `IsRegularLocalRing.of_spanFinrank_maximalIdeal_le` (VERIFIED present);
  the reverse `ringKrullDim R ‚Č§ spanFinrank ūĚĒ™` is Krull's height theorem
  `ringKrullDim_le_spanFinrank_maximalIdeal` (free for ANY Noetherian local ring), so the entire
  residual content is the single goal `‚ÜĎ(spanFinrank ūĚĒ™) ‚Č§ ringKrullDim R`.
- **Regular-local cotangent finrank chain** (Decl 2, axiom-clean one-liner):
  `(IsRegularLocalRing.iff_finrank_cotangentSpace R).mp inferInstance`. dim-1 ‚üĻ DVR endpoint:
  `(IsLocalRing.finrank_CotangentSpace_eq_one_iff (R := R)).mp` ‚ÄĒ note `R` is **implicit**, pass `(R := R)`.
- **`if D = 0` sheaf unwrap** (OcOfD `sheafOf_eq_carrier_of_ne_zero`): the internally-derived

  holds definitionally once the branch is selected (`dif_neg`).

  `carrierSet D U ‚äÜ carrierSet (single Y 1 + D) U` (extra `[Y]` only relaxes `-(‚ÄĘQ) ‚Č§ ord_Q`, via
  `Finsupp.add_apply` + `Finsupp.single_apply` ‚Č• 0 + `linarith`); naturality `V=‚ä•` arm via `Subsingleton`

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-006 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **Conormal/cotangent iso (Route C), axiom-clean** (`cotangentSpace_linearEquiv_baseChange_kaehler`):
  `CotangentSpace R ‚ČÉ‚āó[őļ] őļ‚äó[R]ő©[R‚ĀĄk]` for a FormallySmooth local k-algebra with residue field formally
  smooth over k. Build: injectivity = `(Algebra.FormallySmooth.kerCotangentToTensor_injective_iff hsurj).mpr hh`;
  surjectivity = `KaehlerDifferential.exact_kerCotangentToTensor_mapBaseChange` + `Subsingleton ő©[őļ‚ĀĄk]`
  ‚üĻ `(hex y).mp (Subsingleton.elim _ _)`; bundle `LinearEquiv.ofBijective`; **cast source ideal**
  `(ker (algebraMap R őļ)).Cotangent ‚Üí ūĚĒ™.Cotangent` via `Ideal.Cotangent.equivOfEq _ _ IsLocalRing.ker_residue`;
  **promote R-linear ‚Üí őļ-linear** via `LinearEquiv.extendScalarsOfSurjective hsurj`. ALL ingredients PRESENT
  in pin b80f227 (verified `lean_run_code`). This SUPERSEDES Route R (Stacks 00TT).
- **DVR-stalk interface (the headline-#1 substrate, COMPLETE):** `isDiscreteValuationRing_of_smooth_dim_one`
  now consumes `[FormallySmooth k R] [EssFiniteType k R] [IsNoetherianRing R] [IsDomain R] [Module.Free R ő©]
  [Subsingleton (H1Cotangent k őļ)] [Subsingleton ő©[őļ‚ĀĄk]]` + `(hrank : finrank R ő©[R‚ĀĄk] = 1)`. Proof:
  `finrank_cotangentSpace_eq_finrank_kaehler.trans hrank` ‚üĻ `finrank őļ (CotangentSpace R) = 1` ‚üĻ
  `IsLocalRing.finrank_CotangentSpace_eq_one_iff.mp`. (Signature retargeted from `ringKrullDim R = 1`; NOT
  protected, no downstream usage.)
- **Sheaf-morphism mono lifting** (`carrierSheafHom_le_add_single_mono`): to prove `Mono` of a `Sheaf.Hom`
  in `Sheaf J (ModuleCat kŐĄ)`: `Sheaf.Hom.mono_of_presheaf_mono` (J A explicit) + `NatTrans.mono_of_mono_app`
  both take the mono hypothesis as an **INSTANCE arg** ‚ÄĒ `haveI` them (don't `apply`). Section-wise:
  `ModuleCat.mono_iff_injective` then `apply Submodule.inclusion_injective` (sees through `ConcreteCategory.hom`
  by defeq) + supply the `‚Č§`. The underlying presheaf map is field `.hom` (this pin), NOT `.val`.
- **Mono ‚Üí ShortExact** (`carrierSheaf_ses_single_add`): `ShortComplex.mk f (cokernel.ŌÄ f)` is `ShortExact`
  via `ShortComplex.exact_cokernel` (exactness) + `ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk` (epi of `cokernel.ŌÄ` auto,
  mono supplied). `Abelian`+`HasCokernels` hold for `Sheaf (Opens.grothendieckTopology C.left.toTopCat) (ModuleCat kŐĄ)`.

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-008 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **őļ(x)=kŐĄ affine-local heart, axiom-clean** (`IsAlgClosed.algebraMap_residueField_bijective_of_isMaximal`):
  for `A` finite-type over alg-closed `kŐĄ` and `ūĚĒ≠` MAXIMAL, `kŐĄ ‚Üí őļ(ūĚĒ≠)` is bijective. Build:
  `Ideal.algebraMap_residueField_surjective ūĚĒ≠` (needs `ūĚĒ≠.IsMaximal`) ‚üĻ `IsScalarTower.toAlgHom kŐĄ A ūĚĒ≠.ResidueField`
  surjective ‚üĻ `Algebra.FiniteType.of_surjective` ‚üĻ `FiniteType kŐĄ őļ(ūĚĒ≠)`; then
  `IsAlgClosed.algebraMap_bijective_of_finiteType` = `finite_of_finite_type_of_isJacobsonRing`
  (Zariski/Nullstellensatz; field ‚üĻ `IsJacobsonRing`) ‚Üí `Module.Finite` ‚Üí `Algebra.IsIntegral.of_finite`
  ‚Üí `IsAlgClosed.algebraMap_bijective_of_isIntegral`. Instances `Algebra kŐĄ őļ(ūĚĒ≠)`, `IsScalarTower kŐĄ A őļ(ūĚĒ≠)`
  fire by `inferInstance`.
- **Rationality corollaries from a bijective structure map** (decls 3‚Äď6 of ResidueFieldKbar): given
  `Function.Bijective (algebraMap kŐĄ K)` build `kŐĄ ‚ČÉ‚āź[kŐĄ] K` via `AlgEquiv.ofBijective (Algebra.ofId kŐĄ K) h`,
  then transport: `Algebra.FormallySmooth.of_equiv`, `Algebra.FormallyUnramified.of_equiv` (+
  `subsingleton_kaehlerDifferential`), `Algebra.FormallySmooth.subsingleton_h1Cotangent`. Stated abstractly
  on bijectivity so the geometric őļ(x)‚ČÖkŐĄ application (SmoothStalkDVR consumer) just supplies the hypothesis.
- **coheight-1 ‚üĻ closed point** (`AlgebraicGeometry.isClosed_singleton_of_coheight_eq_one`): from
  `Order.krullDim_eq_iSup_height_add_coheight_of_nonempty` get `height x + coheight x ‚Č§ krullDim X`; with
  `coheight x = 1` + `krullDim X ‚Č§ 1`, ENat arith (`ENat.add_one_le_iff`, `ENat.lt_one_iff_eq_zero`) forces
  `height x = 0` = `IsMin x` (`Order.height_eq_zero`); then `specializes_iff_mem_closure` + scheme order
  convention `x ‚Č§ y ‚ÜĒ y ‚§≥ x` (**holds by `rfl`** for `X : Scheme`, so `closure {x} = Set.Iic x`) +
  `Specializes.antisymm` + `Inseparable.eq` (T0) ‚üĻ `closure {x} = {x}` ‚üĻ `isClosed_closure`. Needs a
  `krullDim ‚Č§ 1` hypothesis (the "curve" input).

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-010 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **Smooth-of-rel-dim-1-over-field chart entry** (`AlgebraicGeometry.exists_isStandardSmooth_chart_of_smooth`):
  the scheme‚Üíring bridge is the `SmoothOfRelativeDimension` **CLASS FIELD**
  `‚ÄĻSmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 C.hom‚Äļ.exists_isStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension x` ‚Üí `‚ü®U,hU,V,hV,hx,e,hss‚ü©`
  with `hss : RingHom.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension 1 (C.hom.appLE U V e).hom`. NOT
  `HasRingHomProperty.appLE` (wrong `Locally(IsStandardSmooth‚Ä¶)` shape). This dissolved the 3-iter STUCK knot.
- **`U = ‚ä§` over `Spec(field)`** (base is `Subsingleton`): `rw [eq_top_iff]; intro y _; rwa [Subsingleton.elim y base]`
  where `base := C.hom.base x` and `hmem : base ‚ąą U := e hx`. AVOID `ext y; simp [Opens.mem_top]` ‚Üí "simp made no
  progress" on the `y ‚ąą ‚ÜĎU ‚ÜĒ y ‚ąą ‚ÜĎ‚ä§` set-coercion goal.
- **Pin a chart's base to `kŐĄ`**: witness `Ōą := ((Scheme.őďSpecIso (.of kŐĄ)).inv ‚Čę C.hom.appLE ‚ä§ V e).hom`; transport
  standard-smoothness via `RingHom.IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension.equiv` (from
  `(őďSpecIso _).symm.commRingCatIsoToRingEquiv`, rewrite by `Iso.commRingCatIsoToRingEquiv_toRingHom`) then `.comp hss`
  (`IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension.comp`, `1 + 0 = 1`).
- **Stalk = localisation at a standard-smooth chart** (`isLocalization_stalk_standardSmooth_chart_of_smooth`): one-liner
  `‚ü®V,hV,hx,Ōą,hŌą, hV.isLocalization_stalk ‚ü®x,hx‚ü©‚ü©` ‚ÄĒ `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_stalk`'s algebra instance IS
  `algebra_section_stalk`, so it matches the explicit `@IsLocalization` goal on the nose (no `convert`).
- **`kŐĄ`-algebra on a scheme residue field from the structure morphism** (`AlgebraicGeometry.residueFieldAlgebra`):
  `RingHom.toAlgebra <| (C.hom.residueFieldMap x).hom.comp <| (Scheme.Spec.residueFieldIso (.of kŐĄ) (C.hom.base x)).inv.hom.comp (algebraMap kŐĄ (C.hom.base x).asIdeal.ResidueField)`.
  Mark `@[reducible]` so the downstream `algebraMap = ‚Ä¶` match is `rfl`.
- **Closed codim-1 point ‚áí őļ(x) ‚ČÖ kŐĄ, one shot** (`residueField_eq_of_coheight_eq_one`): Mathlib
  `AlgebraicGeometry.residueFieldIsoBase` (`AlgClosed/Basic.lean`) gives `őļ(x) ‚ČÖ .of kŐĄ` for a closed point of a
  `LocallyOfFiniteType` scheme over an alg-closed field (internally bundles the Nullstellensatz content). Prove the
  canonical structure map `= (residueFieldIsoBase ‚Ä¶).inv.hom` via `Spec.map_injective` +
  `SpecMap_residueFieldIsoBase_inv` + `map_residueFieldIso_inv_eq_fromSpecResidueField` +
  `SpecMap_residueFieldMap_fromSpecResidueField`, conclude `ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso`. SUPERSEDES the
  hand-rolled 6-step affine-chart Nullstellensatz route (iter-008 decls now orphaned from the critical path).
- **`CommRingCat` iso ‚Üí `RingEquiv`**: `CategoryTheory.Iso.commRingCatIsoToRingEquiv` (+ `_toRingHom` to land on `.hom`).

  `krullDim_curve_le_one` (iter-013) existed, it was a 3-decl mechanical wire:
  `isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_smooth` (one-line:
  `isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_finrank_cotangentSpace_eq_one x (finrank_cotangentSpace_stalk_eq_one_of_smooth x hx krullDim_curve_le_one)`)
  + global instance `instIsRegularInCodimensionOneOfSmooth`
  (`‚ü®fun Y => isDiscreteValuationRing_stalk_of_smooth Y.point Y.coheight‚ü©`) + `haveI := inferInstance`
  at the call site. `sheafOf`, `sheafOf_zero` both axiom-clean now. Remaining OcOfD frontier = S3
  skyscraper-cokernel iso (L1086) + off-cone `sheafOf_singlePoint_iso` (L745).
- **`sheafOf_ses_single_add` main case CLOSED (iter-014, PARTIAL decl).** Generic case (`D‚Č†0 ‚ąß [P]+D‚Č†0`)
  delegates to `carrierSheaf_ses_single_add` via `sheafOf_eq_carrier_of_ne_zero`. 2 corner sorries
  (`D=0`/`[P]+D=0`) remain, blocked on a `carrierSheaf 0 ‚ČÖ toModuleKSheaf C` bridge (regular fns =
  order-‚Č•0 on integral scheme, Hartshorne II ¬ß6 pre-Prop 6.11) ‚ÄĒ queue with iter-015 cokernel.

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **Substrate-wiring as a GLOBAL instance** beats inline `haveI ... ‚ü®‚Ä¶‚ü©`: lifting a codim-1 regularity
  witness to a top-level `instance` makes downstream `haveI := inferInstance` and is reusable.
  Pattern: `‚ü®fun Y => <stalk-lemma> Y.point Y.coheight‚ü©` (a `Scheme.PrimeDivisor Y` carries `Y.coheight`).
- **Namespace placement must match the blueprint `\lean{}` pin**: place a decl in the namespace the
  pin names (here `AlgebraicGeometry`, NOT the enclosing `Scheme.WeilDivisor` section) ‚ÄĒ else
  fully-qualified name mismatches break `sync_leanok`/dag resolution. Prover caught+corrected mid-session.
- **Verify import back-edge absent before adding an import**: CurveKrullDim‚ÜíOcOfD was safe because
  CurveKrullDim imports only SmoothStalkDVR+CoheightBridge, neither of which imports OcOfD/WeilDivisor.

### Documentation-rot watch
- **OcOfD.lean carries 5 STALE Lean comments contradicting iter-014's closed work** (lean-auditor majors,
  review cannot edit `.lean`): module docstring "four decls Tier-3 sorry"; `sheafOf` docstring "general
  case still a sorry" / "iter-183 Lane K Tier-3 honest typed sorry"; body comment "residual sorry is
  cotangent fact, no Mathlib bridge"; `sheafOf_ses_single_add` comment "gated on L635". Hand a
  comment-only cleanup to the next OcOfD prover. (Blueprint `% NOTE: [expected]` twins FIXED this pass.)

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-015 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **Effort-break a deep iso into an `asIso` chain, not a blind retry.** A single opaque `‚ČÖ : A ‚ČÖ B`
  that resisted 3 blind attempts (sorry 0‚Üí2‚Üí4) was dissolved by introducing a *named comparison
  morphism* `f : A ‚ü∂ B` (def stub) + its `IsIso f` (lemma stub) and writing the iso as
  `haveI := <isIso-lemma>; asIso f`. The iso body becomes `sorry`-FREE immediately; all deep work is
  relocated into the two stubs. Verified non-circular (auditor): the `asIso` assembly delegates the
  `sorry` into the named leaves, it does not consume itself. This is the canonical decomposition
  shape for "iso whose proof is a stalkwise/pointwise argument."
- **Prove the *target object* of a stubbed `‚ČÖ` even when the `‚ČÖ` itself is stubbed.** Here
  `sheafOf.orderAtPSubmodule` (the fractional ideal `ŌÄ_P^{-n}ūĚí™` as the `Submodule kŐĄ K(C)` cut out by
  `g = 0 ‚ą® -(D P) ‚Č§ ord_P g`) was proved axiom-clean (closure proofs adapted from `carrierSubmodule`
  specialised to one prime: `Ring.ordFrac_add`, `Ring.ordFrac_ge_one_of_ne_zero`, germ-to-stalk for
  scalars) while the stalk iso `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` landing in it stays a stub. Banks reusable
  infra and makes the next prover's target concrete.

### Mathlib-API watch (for the next OcOfD prover)
- **`CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val` is DEPRECATED** (use `ObjectProperty.obj`). It appears in the *types* of
  the two deep stubs `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (L1142) and `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1161). Harmless
  as a stub (only a deprecation warning) but **will surface as errors when the bodies are filled** ‚ÄĒ
  migrate the type to the non-deprecated accessor before/while proving. (lean-auditor iter-015 major #5.)

### Documentation-rot watch (CARRIED + EXTENDED ‚ÄĒ still unfixed, review cannot edit `.lean`)
- **OcOfD.lean module header + docstrings are now MORE stale after iter-015.** lean-auditor iter-015
  (0 must-fix, 6 major / 7 minor) confirms: (a) header "Status" block names 2 sorries ‚ÄĒ actual is 7
  (5 new S3 stubs unlisted); (b) the 3-tier disclosure (L68‚Äď74) + `sheafOf` docstring (L606‚Äď633) +
  `sheafOf_zero` docstring (L692‚Äď700) still call those decls "Tier-3 honest typed sorry" though they are
  fully implemented (LSP: no sorry-warning). These are the iter-014 stale-comment majors PLUS the new
  count drift. **All comment-only; no laundering, no excuse-comments ‚ÄĒ every one of the 7 sorry stubs
  carries an honest mathematical type.** Hand a single comment-only cleanup directive to the next OcOfD
  prover; pair it with the `Sheaf.val` migration above.

## Knowledge Base ‚ÄĒ RiemannRoch subproject (iter-016 addition)

### Proof patterns (reusable)
- **A decomposed deep leaf can collapse to a 2-line composition.** The binding stalk leaf
  `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (feared 200‚Äď400 LOC, "no Mathlib carrier-stalk API") closed as
  `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup ‚Č™‚Čę eqToIso (by rw [iSup_‚Ä¶_eq_orderAtPSubmodule])` once the two named
  seams existed. Pattern: when a `‚ČÖ`-leaf is `(stalk ‚ČÖ ‚®Üőď(U)) ‚ąė (‚®Üőď(U) = target)`, prove the
  stalk-colimit iso (seam A) and the directed-iSup identification (seam B) separately, then compose with
  `eqToIso` over the submodule equality. Don't prove the leaf monolithically.
- **Germ-API stalk-colimit descent for a sub-presheaf-of-modules of a constant sheaf.** Build
  `ŌÜ : stalk F x ‚ü∂ ModuleCat.of k M` (M = `‚®Ü_U őď(U)`) via `Limits.colimit.desc` of the cocone with legs
  `Submodule.inclusion`; cocone naturality reduces at element level to "restriction preserves underlying
  value" (helper `carrierPresheaf_map_coe`, via `dif_neg` = `Submodule.inclusion` away from `‚ä•`).
  Injective: `injective_iff_map_eq_zero` + `germ_exist`. Surjective: `Submodule.mem_iSup_of_directed`
  (family directed through `U ‚äď V`). Finish `ConcreteCategory.isIso_iff_bijective` + `asIso`. (Per
  `analogies/stalk-colimit.md`. `ModuleCat.isIso_iff_bijective` IS `ConcreteCategory.isIso_iff_bijective`.)
- **Finite-poles open from closed prime-divisor points.** To realise an order constraint on a small open:
  affine `W ‚ąč x`, finite bad set `B`, `Z = ‚čÉ_{Q‚ąąB}{Q.point}` is closed because each prime-divisor point is
  closed on the curve (`isClosed_singleton_of_coheight_eq_one` + `krullDim_curve_le_one`); take `W ‚äď ZŠ∂ú`.

### Mathlib-API watch
- **`TopologicalSpace.Opens.not_mem_bot` does NOT exist.** To discharge `x ‚ąą (‚ä• : Opens)` ‚Üí `False`, use a
  membership rewrite: `have h : (U) = ‚ä• := hbot; rw [h] at hmem; exact hmem` (the `‚ä•` Opens has empty carrier).
- **`carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` hard direction is pinned.** `IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`
  (`x ‚ąą Frac(R)`, `v(x) ‚Č§ 1` at all height-one `v`, `[IsDedekindDomain R]` ‚áí `x ‚ąą R`). Needs per-chart
  Dedekind + `HeightOneSpectrum.valuation = RationalMap.order` + gluing. Dedicated lane.

### Process gotcha
- **Blueprint `private` cross-file lemmas are inaccessible.** B0 could not call `finite_order_support_affine`
  (private in `WeilDivisor.lean`) from `OcOfD.lean`; the pivot to global `principal`-divisor finiteness was
  forced, not chosen. When a blueprint route cites a private lemma in another file, the Lean route WILL diverge.

### Documentation-rot watch (CARRIED + WORSE ‚ÄĒ review cannot edit `.lean`)
- OcOfD header/docstrings still label the now-closed carrier-stalk chain (`sheafOf`, `sheafOf_zero`,
  `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`) as STUBBED/Tier-3. lean-auditor iter-016 0/6/3 ‚ÄĒ all 6 majors are this stale
  text. Comment-only cleanup owed to the next OcOfD prover (pair with no code change).
